title: Trash
description: Items here will be permanently deleted after the guild's retention period. Restore at any time before then.
deleteNowConfirmDescription: This will hard-delete the {{type}} and everything inside it. This cannot be undone.

reassignDialog.title: Pick a new owner
reassignDialog.description: The original owner of this {{type}} is no longer a member of the initiative. Pick someone to take ownership before restoring.
